flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pitt Community College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.5k → $8.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pitt Community College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.9k → $2.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pitt Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pitt Community College rose 60% between 2006 and 2009 (7.7% → 12.3%).
